ddls:
CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "franchise" TEXT /* Franchise associated with the team */,
  "league" TEXT /* League in which the team competes */,
  "division" TEXT /* Division within the league */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the team is based */,
  "stadium" TEXT /* Name of the stadium or arena where the team plays */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the team was founded */,
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the coach of the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_coach_id FOREIGN KEY ("coach_id") REFERENCES coaches ("coach_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "seasons" (
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each season */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year in which the season takes place */,
  "season_format" TEXT /* Format of the season (e.g., regular season, playoffs) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the season */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the season */,
  "playoff_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the playoffs */,
  "playoff_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the playoffs */,
  "champion_team_id" INTEGER /* The team that won the championship */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_seasons_champion_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("champion_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_stats" (
  "stats_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance record */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team associated with the stats */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the season associated with the stats */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the game associated with the stats */,
  "opponent_team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the opponent team */,
  "game_date" TEXT /* Date of the game */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the game (home or away) */,
  "win_loss" TEXT /* Win or loss indicator for the game */,
  "team_points" INTEGER /* Total points scored by the team */,
  "assists" INTEGER /* Total assists made by the team */,
  "field_goals" INTEGER /* Total field goals made by the team */,
  "total_rebounds" INTEGER /* Total rebounds made by the team */,
  "wins" INTEGER /* Total wins in the season */,
  "losses" INTEGER /* Total losses in the season */,
  "win_percentage" REAL /* Win percentage calculated as wins / (wins + losses) * 100 */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Number of spectators at the game */,
  "quarter_points" TEXT /* Points scored in each quarter (JSON array) */,
  "three_pointers_made" INTEGER /* Total three-pointers made */,
  "three_point_attempts" INTEGER /* Total three-point attempts */,
  "free_throws_made" INTEGER /* Total free throws made */,
  "free_throw_attempts" INTEGER /* Total free throw attempts */,
  "turnovers" INTEGER /* Total turnovers */,
  "steals" INTEGER /* Total steals */,
  "blocks" INTEGER /* Total blocks */,
  "fouls" INTEGER /* Total fouls */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stats_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_stats_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_stats_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_stats_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_stats_opponent_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("opponent_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., coach, analyst) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was last updated */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating whether the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "coaches" (
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each coach */,
  "coach_name" TEXT /* Full name of the coach */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the coach */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the coach */,
  "hired_date" TEXT /* Date the coach was hired */,
  "dismissed_date" TEXT /* Date the coach was dismissed (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("coach_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the season in which the game was played */,
  "home_team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the home team */,
  "away_team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the away team */,
  "game_date" TEXT /* Date of the game */,
  "stadium" TEXT /* Name of the stadium where the game was played */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Number of spectators at the game */,
  "referee" TEXT /* Name of the referee */,
  "score_home" INTEGER /* Score of the home team */,
  "score_away" INTEGER /* Score of the away team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_home_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("home_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_away_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("away_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)
